title: Set RDP Bitmap Cache Overall Score
content:
This playbook sets the RDP bitmap cache overall score

Cortex XSOAR/XSIAM SOAR playbook from the Cortex XSOAR pack (RDPCacheHunting, xsoar-supported).

Outputs — OverallScore: The overall score.

Integrations/scripts used: Set.

      version: -1
      name: Set string similarity score
      description: Set a value in context under the key you entered.
      scriptName: Set
      type: regular
      iscommand: false
      brand: ""

      '#none#':
      - "2"
    scriptarguments:
      key:
        simple: OverallScore
      value:

          root: StringSimilarity
          accessor: SimilarityScore
          transformers:
          - operator: SumList
          - operator: multiply
            args:
              by:
                value:
                  simple: "5"
          - operator: precision
            args:
              by:
                value:
                  simple: "1"
